report.summary: Cycle-close v6: 331 PUBLISHED_PAGES (+3 from v5), 438 files still staged/uncommitted, CRITICAL staged next.config.ts still drops standalone output, rate limiter 0/6 wired, FOMC T-2 (Mar 18) window active.

sections.title: QA — Page & Build Health
items: ✅ PUBLISHED_PAGES: 331 confirmed — up 3 from v5 (328). Delta likely from recent publish-queue promotions
✅ PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 page remaining — /learn/aztec-network-guide (Day 37 candidate, still queued)
✅ TypeScript: No new TS errors detected this cycle — same 57-error baseline across structured-data.examples.ts + AICourseRecommendations.tsx, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true)

⚠️ published-pages.ts audit: node page-existence script returned exit 1 — unable to confirm missing page.tsx count programmatically. Prior cycle baseline: ~100 of 328 slugs missing page.tsx files. Assume similar delta; no new scaffolding committed this cycle
⚠️ src/app/badges/page.tsx and src/app/courses/[slug]/page.tsx and src/app/courses/page.tsx are DELETED in staged index — these pages will 404 on next deploy if committed as-is
⚠️ 438 files staged, uncommitted — unchanged from v5. No new files staged this cycle
ℹ️ src/app/airdrops/page.tsx modified in staged index — needs review before commit

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Health
items: ✅ All 6 target API routes present in filesystem: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields

⚠️ DEPLOYMENT GAP: 5 of 6 API routes are staged but NOT committed — only /api/market-metrics is live in production. Routes for prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields are NOT serving traffic yet
✅ /api/market-metrics: Live, in-memory cache + CDN headers confirmed from prior cycles
⚠️ No hardcoded fallback data on /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/defi-yields — cold-start + upstream outage = error response
🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes protected — checkRateLimit() exists in rate-limiter.ts but wired to ZERO routes. FOMC T-2 urgency: high-traffic event in ~2 days
ℹ️ 4 additional infra routes staged: cache-stats, health, newsletter, subscribe — awaiting commit + deploy

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: ✅ Last deployed commit: 1b4a15e 'Fix: commit missing ecosystem + courses routes and fix stargate JSX error' — unchanged, no new deploy this cycle

🔴 CRITICAL (CARRY-OVER): Staged next.config.ts removes output: 'standalone' and bumps staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4→8. Committing this BREAKS Vercel serverless deployment. Fix: git restore --staged next.config.ts before any commit
⚠️ Staged middleware.ts removes /learn/solana-alpenglow-guide and /learn/onchain-finance-onfi-guide from PILLAR_PAGES set — impacts CDN cache tier for those 2 pages on next deploy
⚠️ middleware.ts working-tree has conflicting changes vs staged — merge conflict present, must be resolved before commit
⚠️ 438 staged files + 52 new published-pages.ts slugs remain undeployed — full production gap grows each cycle without commit
⚠️ Vercel trial: ~8 days remaining (1 day elapsed since v5 estimate of ~9 days) — Jefe payment action required
ℹ️ Direct HTTP checks to degen0x.com blocked in sandbox — live 200-status verification not possible; assume stable per Vercel dashboard

NO NEW COMMITS this cycle — 438-file staged batch unchanged from v5
